headline: Israel warns U.S. of ‘critically low’ interceptor stocks amid Iran war
summary: Investing.com -- Israel has informed the United States that its stockpile of ballistic missile interceptors has reached "critically low" levels as the regional conflict with Iran continues to escalate, according to an exclusive SEMAFOR report.
